data.summary: [Emergency Maintenance Notice] Emergency maintenance is on the way to resolve an issue. Maintenance
data.body:
[Emergency Maintenance Notice]
Emergency maintenance is on the way to resolve an issue.

Maintenance Period: 11/16 (Tue) 07:10 AM (UTC) ~ TBD

We will notice if there is any change to the maintenance schedule.
We apologize for the inconvenience.



Thank you all for your patience, Sensei.
11/16(Tue) Emergency maintenance has ended.
We apologize for the inconvenience caused.

Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/94897
Rewards: Pyroxene x 1200, AP x 70, Total Assault Ticket x 1 (Available until 11/23 14:59 PM (UTC))
